rulings.Case Title: JOHN MASERO et al VS. HONEYWELL INTERNATIONAL, INC.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for August 4, 2016, Thursday, in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant CSK Auto, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment is off calendar at the moving party's request. = (503/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: LARRY WEAVER VS. GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for August 4, 2016, Thursday, in Department 503, Line 2. Brayton Purcell LLP's, Nancy Williams' motion for withdrawal of attorney of record for plaintiffs is continued on the court's own motion to August 11, 2016. = (503/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: BARBARA MURPHY ET AL VS. KELLY MOORE PAINT COMPANY, INC. ET AL
